Metadata.title: Prooved — Reputation. Cross-platform. Provable.
Metadata.description: Bundle your eBay, PayPal, Vinted and Kleinanzeigen ratings into one verified profile.

Hero.subline: Bundle your ratings from eBay, PayPal, Vinted and Kleinanzeigen into one verified profile.
Hero.step3: Share your profile link — instead of screenshots
Hero.disclaimer: We don't create our own ratings. We only verify that an account belongs to you.

Trust.readOnlyText: Read-only access to public ratings via official APIs. No posts, no purchases, no messages on your behalf.
Trust.notPasswords: No platform passwords stored with us (OAuth only)
Trust.oneClickDelete: Delete your account in one click, anytime

SecurityPage.metaDescription: Our independent security proofs, open-source code, disclosure policy, and contact for vulnerability reports.
SecurityPage.intro: We take trust seriously. Below are independent security proofs, our source code, and how to report vulnerabilities.
SecurityPage.hardenizeText: Independent scan: TLS, HSTS, CSP, DNSSEC, CAA, DMARC. Live data, no cache.
SecurityPage.scorecardText: Automated open-source security score: pinned dependencies, CI best practices, branch protection.
SecurityPage.repoText: Fully open source under MIT. Read, audit, or fork the code.
SecurityPage.policyText: How to report a vulnerability. We respond within 72 hours.
SecurityPage.contactText: For security researchers: security@prooved.xyz. PGP on request.

AboutPage.metaDescription: Prooved bundles your ratings from eBay, PayPal, Vinted and Kleinanzeigen into one verified profile.
AboutPage.whatIs: Prooved bundles your ratings from marketplaces like eBay, PayPal, Vinted and Kleinanzeigen into a single, shareable profile. Instead of screenshots or "just trust me," you get a verified link to share in listings or DMs.
AboutPage.whatIsNot: Prooved does not create its own ratings. We only verify that an account really belongs to the named person, and we display the platform's official stats. Source and verification date appear transparently under every card.
AboutPage.howVerifyGold: Gold — official OAuth integration (eBay, PayPal). Highest trust level.
AboutPage.howVerifySilver: Silver — bio-code method: a code in your platform profile proves ownership (Vinted, Kleinanzeigen).
AboutPage.privacyText: We only store what's needed: email, slug, encrypted platform tokens, cached rating stats. You can export your data or delete your account anytime. Details in the <link>privacy policy</link>.

HowItWorks.metaDescription: What Prooved verifies, what we don't guarantee — transparently explained.
HowItWorks.intro: We aggregate your real reputation from eBay, PayPal, Vinted and other platforms into a shareable profile. Transparent, no black-box score, no invented ratings.
HowItWorks.checkOwnership: Ownership: only you can verify your account — either via OAuth login (eBay, PayPal, GitHub, LinkedIn) or via bio code in your profile description on platforms without an API (Vinted, Kleinanzeigen, Discogs, …).
HowItWorks.checkData: Platform data: we read publicly available rating stats (stars, count, % positive, member-since) and surface them 1:1.
HowItWorks.checkKyc: Identity on KYC platforms: PayPal and LinkedIn provide verified real names from genuine KYC processes. If you display that, the buyer knows: this name was checked by a third party.
HowItWorks.noGuaranteeAuth: Authenticity of ratings: we show what the platform shows. If an account has fake ratings — that's a platform problem, not a Prooved problem.
HowItWorks.noGuaranteeTx: Transaction protection: Prooved is not an escrow service. For purchases, still use the buyer protection of the relevant platform (PayPal, eBay, ...).
HowItWorks.noGuaranteeLive: Live availability / delivery: we show data, not real-time activity.
HowItWorks.scoreIntro: Up to 100 points from 5 transparent building blocks, each visible individually in the profile breakdown:
HowItWorks.scoreIdentityDetail: KYC (PayPal/LinkedIn) +20 · Real name public +5 · Image verified +5
HowItWorks.scoreMarketplaceDetail: Number of platforms +10/+20/+30 · Rate ≥95% +10 · Rate <80% penalty
HowItWorks.tierExplain: Tier levels: 0–29 New · 30–49 Bronze · 50–69 Silver · 70–89 Gold · 90+ Diamond. Tier cap: with a positive rate below 70 %, the score is capped at Bronze — regardless of the number of connected platforms.
HowItWorks.readingTitle: What matters when reading a profile page
HowItWorks.readingHeader: Stat header: positive rate (red if <50 %, orange if <90 %), rating count, active-since year.
HowItWorks.readingMismatch: Real-name mismatch warning: if the LinkedIn name and PayPal name don't match, the buyer sees it.
HowItWorks.readingCards: Platform cards: concrete rating count, member-since, data freshness. Anomalies (e.g. 500 ratings but account only from this year) are flagged in yellow.
HowItWorks.readingBreakdown: Score breakdown: clicking the score opens the full calculation — no hidden factors.
HowItWorks.securityTokens: OAuth tokens AES-256-GCM encrypted, decrypted only server-side
HowItWorks.securityReadonly: All OAuth scopes are read-only — even on token leak, nobody can sell or post in your name
HowItWorks.securityBio: Bio code cryptographically bound to your Prooved account — others can't verify a foreign profile themselves
HowItWorks.securityMagic: Magic-link login instead of passwords — no brute-force
HowItWorks.securityControl: Per connection: refresh / pause / hide / disconnect — you stay in control
HowItWorks.securityNotify: Email notification on every new connection — account hijacks become obvious immediately
HowItWorks.limitsSandbox: eBay sandbox test users often have 0 % positive rate — that's platform test data, not a real profile
HowItWorks.limitsCustom: "Other platform" verifies ownership of any public link but doesn't extract rating data
HowItWorks.limitsBio: New marketplaces without an official API can only be checked via bio code — fragile against layout changes
HowItWorks.limitsKyc: We don't verify identity at a state level (Postident etc.) — KYC comes indirectly via PayPal/LinkedIn

Imprint.subline: Information pursuant to § 5 DDG (German Digital Services Act)
Imprint.vatText: No VAT is charged pursuant to § 19 UStG (small-business regulation).
Imprint.responsibleTitle: Responsible for content pursuant to § 18 (2) MStV
Imprint.euDisputeText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): <link>https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/</link>. We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
Imprint.liabilityContentText: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general laws pursuant to § 7 (1) DDG. According to §§ 8 to 10 DDG, however, as a service provider we are not obliged to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances indicating illegal activity.
Imprint.liabilityLinksText: Our offer contains links to external third-party websites (eBay, PayPal, Vinted, Kleinanzeigen, etc.) over whose content we have no influence. The respective provider or operator is always responsible for the content of the linked pages.
Imprint.trademarkText: Mentioned trademarks and logos (eBay, PayPal, Vinted, Kleinanzeigen, Discogs, etc.) are the property of their respective owners. Prooved has no business relationship with these platforms unless explicitly stated.

Privacy.s1Text: Martin Dehlan, Am Breiten Luch 46, 13053 Berlin, Germany. Email:
Privacy.s2Account: Account data: email address, slug, optional name. Legal basis: Art. 6 (1) (b) GDPR (contract performance).
Privacy.s2Connections: Platform connections: platform user ID, profile URL, verification tokens (AES-256 encrypted), cached public rating stats (score, count).
Privacy.s2Wallet: Wallet data (optional): Solana public key, cryptographic signature. Only if you use wallet features.
Privacy.s2Reports: Reports: IP address, timestamp, reason. For spam and abuse prevention (Art. 6 (1) (f) GDPR).
Privacy.s2Logs: Server logs: IP address, user agent, timestamp via our host (Vercel). Retention max. 30 days.
Privacy.s3Vercel: Vercel Inc. (USA) — hosting, CDN, logs. Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC) and EU-US Data Privacy Framework.
Privacy.s3Supabase: Supabase Inc. (USA, EU region available) — database, authentication, edge functions.
Privacy.s3Resend: Resend — delivery of magic-link and system emails.
Privacy.s3Posthog: PostHog (EU Cloud, Frankfurt) — product analytics and session replay to improve the service. Cookieless mode (in-memory persistence only), no third-party cookies. Legal basis: Art. 6 (1) (f) GDPR (legitimate interest in product improvement and error analysis).
Privacy.s3Third: Third-party platform APIs (eBay, PayPal, Vinted, Kleinanzeigen, Discogs): transmission only at your initiation as part of verification. The privacy terms of the respective platform apply.
Privacy.s4Oauth: For OAuth flows (eBay, PayPal), access tokens are stored AES-256 encrypted. We access only public rating endpoints — no transaction data, no purchases, no messages.
Privacy.s4Bio: For bio-code flows (Vinted, Kleinanzeigen), our server checks your public profile text once and discards the code afterwards. No platform login data is stored.
Privacy.s5Cookies: We use technically necessary cookies for authentication (Supabase session) and a local theme setting (dark/light). No tracking or advertising cookies.
Privacy.s5Posthog: Our analytics service PostHog runs in cookieless mode (in-memory persistence during the current browser session only) and sets neither cookies nor local-storage entries. No recognition across sessions.
Privacy.s6Text: Your slug, your name (if provided) and verified platform stats are publicly available at /{slug}. Indexing by search engines is possible. You can delete the profile at any time.
Privacy.s7Account: Account data: until you delete your account
Privacy.s7Connections: Connections: until disconnected or account deleted
Privacy.s8Rights: You have the right to access (Art. 15), rectification (Art. 16), erasure (Art. 17), restriction (Art. 18), data portability (Art. 20) and objection (Art. 21 GDPR). Right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority: <link>Berlin Commissioner for Data Protection</link>.
Privacy.s8Account: You can delete your account anytime under <settings>Settings</settings>. For data export or other requests, write to
Privacy.s9Text: If you mint Soulbound Tokens (SBTs), they are stored irreversibly and publicly on the Solana blockchain. Deletion by us is technically not possible. This feature is optional and requires your explicit consent.
Privacy.s10Text: This policy may be updated. The current version is always available at this URL.

DataDeletion.intro: You can delete your Prooved account and all associated data at any time yourself. This page explains how.
DataDeletion.s1Effect: What happens: your account, all platform connections (eBay, PayPal, Vinted, Kleinanzeigen, Facebook, Discogs), wallet link, reports and logs are immediately and irreversibly removed from our database. Your public profile at /your-slug stops working right away.
DataDeletion.s2Text: If you only want to disconnect Facebook (and keep your Prooved account), open the connection card in your dashboard and click "Disconnect". We delete the stored Facebook access token, the Facebook user ID and all profile data from Facebook out of our database.
DataDeletion.s2Alt: Alternatively, remove Prooved directly on Facebook: Facebook → Settings → Apps and Websites → Prooved → Remove. We are notified via webhook and delete your Facebook data automatically.
DataDeletion.s3Text: If you no longer have access to your account, write to us from the email address you registered with at
DataDeletion.s3Sla: We confirm deletion within 30 days (GDPR Art. 17).
DataDeletion.s4Onchain: Solana Soulbound Tokens (SBTs) you minted yourself live irreversibly on the blockchain. Deletion is technically impossible. This feature is optional and you are explicitly warned before minting.
DataDeletion.s4Logs: Anonymized server logs (no personal data) may be retained for up to 30 days for security purposes.

Terms.s1Text: These terms govern the use of the "Prooved" service (the "Service"), provided by Martin Dehlan, Am Breiten Luch 46, 13053 Berlin (the "Provider"). By registering, you agree to these terms.
Terms.s2Text1: Prooved allows users to verify ratings and reputation data from third-party platforms (e.g. eBay, PayPal, Vinted, Kleinanzeigen) via official APIs or bio-code methods and to bundle them into a public profile.
Terms.s2Text2: The Provider does not create its own ratings. Displayed values come exclusively from the respective third-party platform.
Terms.s3Text1: Use requires registration with a valid email address. You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential. Only one account per person is permitted.
Terms.s3Text2: You warrant that all connected platform accounts actually belong to you. Connecting third-party accounts is prohibited.
Terms.s4Intro: You undertake not to use the Service to:
Terms.s4Bypass: circumvent technical safeguards or rate limits,
Terms.s4Share: pass bio codes or verification tokens to third parties,
Terms.s4ThirdParty: violate the terms of the connected third-party platforms.
Terms.s5Text: The Provider has no official business relationship with eBay, PayPal, Vinted, Kleinanzeigen, Discogs or other mentioned platforms unless explicitly stated. Availability and function of individual integrations may change if third-party platforms adjust their APIs or policies.
Terms.s6Text: The Provider strives for high availability but does not owe uninterrupted reachability. Maintenance work, outages at third-party platforms or force majeure may cause restrictions.
Terms.s7Text1: The Provider is liable without limitation for intent and gross negligence as well as for damages from injury to life, body or health. For simple negligence, the Provider is liable only for breach of essential contractual obligations and limited to foreseeable, contract-typical damage.
Terms.s7Text2: No liability is assumed for the accuracy of data provided by third-party platforms.
Terms.s8Text: You can delete your account at any time under <settings>Settings</settings>. The Provider may suspend or delete accounts for violations of these terms.
Terms.s9Text: The Provider reserves the right to amend these terms. You will be informed of material changes by email. Right to object: 30 days; after expiry, the amended terms are deemed accepted.
Terms.s10Text: German law applies. If individual provisions are invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions remains unaffected.

DashboardSettings.emailPending: Confirmation link sent to {email}. Click it to complete the change.
DashboardSettings.emailSameError: New email is identical to the current one.
DashboardSettings.dangerText: Removes your account, all platform connections and reported profiles. Irreversible.
DashboardSettings.deleteConfirm: Really delete? This action is permanent.

DeleteAccount.errorFallback: Please try again or contact support@prooved.xyz.

ConnectPage.subline: Choose a platform to verify your ratings.

ConnectFlow.bioCodeIntro: Paste this code into your {platform} profile description. We check once and you can remove the code afterwards.
ConnectFlow.bioCodeError: Verification failed. Make sure the code is in your bio.

ProfilePage.suspendedText: This profile was suspended for violating our policies.

PublicProfile.warningQualityCap: Positive rate below 70% — score capped at Bronze.

ReportPage.subline: We review every report manually. Anti-spam: max. 3 reports per IP / day.

ReportForm.successText: Thanks. Your report has been submitted for review.

ConnectionList.noConnectionsHint: Connect eBay, PayPal, Vinted or another platform.

BioCodeFlow.codeNotFound: Code not yet found in your {field}.

step.0: On [vinted.com](https://www.vinted.com), click your profile picture top right
step.1: Open profile — copy the URL from the address bar

kleinanzeigen.prerequisite: Kleinanzeigen profiles have no bio field. You need at least one active listing — paste the code into its title or description.

step.1: Open a listing (or create a new one)
step.2: Paste the code into title or description — save listing

step.1: Paste code into the "Profile" field + "Save settings"

shpock.prerequisite: Shpock profiles have no bio field. You need at least one active listing — paste the code into its title or description.

step.0: Sign in to [shpock.com](https://www.shpock.com) → plus button → create listing (or open existing)
step.1: Paste code into title or description, publish listing

reverb.prerequisite: You need a Reverb shop (seller profile).

step.1: Edit "About / Description" field, paste code, save

DomainVerifyFlow.step1: 1. Set TXT record at your DNS provider
DomainVerifyFlow.name: Name:
DomainVerifyFlow.propagationHint: DNS propagation can take up to 1h.

CustomVerifyFlow.step1Hint: Paste it on the platform of your choice into profile bio, listing title, description or post — as long as it's publicly accessible.
CustomVerifyFlow.urlLabel: URL of the page with the code
CustomVerifyFlow.urlHint: The page must be publicly reachable (without login). We only read the HTML — no rating data is extracted.
CustomVerifyFlow.codeNotFound: Code not found at the URL.
CustomVerifyFlow.warning: Note: custom platform yields no rating data — only ownership proof. The trust score gets marketplace points but no quality bonus. Dynamic SPAs (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok) often don't work — users need an HTML page with a visible code.

TrustScoreCard.title: Trust score
TrustScoreCard.qualityCap: ⚠ Rate below 70% — score capped at Bronze.

AvatarSettings.title: Profile picture
AvatarSettings.noSources: Connect PayPal, LinkedIn or GitHub to use their profile picture.

SlugOnboarding.title: Set up your profile
SlugOnboarding.intro: Choose your profile address. It cannot be changed later.

Register.title: Sign in
Register.intro: Magic link via email. No password.

SlugSchema.regexError: Only a-z, 0-9 and dashes. No dash at start/end.

ebay.title: Connect eBay
ebay.subline: Gold tier · OAuth. You'll be redirected to eBay; we fetch FeedbackScore via the Trading API.

paypal.title: Connect PayPal
paypal.subline: Gold tier · OAuth. We only fetch identity status, no transaction data.

etsy.title: Connect Etsy
etsy.subline: Gold tier · OAuth. We fetch rating average and count of your shop via Etsy API v3.

github.title: Connect GitHub
github.subline: Silver tier · OAuth. Proves account age, activity and (if set) verified real name.

linkedin.title: Connect LinkedIn
linkedin.subline: Gold tier · OAuth. Trust signal: verified real name (KYC-grade).

facebook.title: Connect Facebook
facebook.subline: Silver tier · OAuth. Proves identity (verified name + email). Meta does not expose Marketplace ratings via API.

vinted.title: Connect Vinted
vinted.subline: Silver tier · Bio code · valid 30 days.

kleinanzeigen.title: Connect Kleinanzeigen
kleinanzeigen.subline: Silver tier · Bio code · valid 30 days. No official API — on layout changes verification may briefly fall back to "unavailable".

willhaben.title: Connect Willhaben
willhaben.subline: Silver tier · Bio code in seller description. AT market.

discogs.title: Connect Discogs
discogs.subline: Silver tier · Bio code in profile description. Valid 30 days.

shpock.title: Connect Shpock
shpock.subline: Silver tier · Bio code in About section.

reverb.title: Connect Reverb
reverb.subline: Silver tier · Bio code in shop description. Valid 30 days.

website.title: Connect your website
website.subline: Silver tier · DNS TXT record. Proves you own the domain.

custom.title: Connect other platform
custom.subline: Silver tier · Bio code on any page. Proves ownership without reading rating data.
